selections.name: Bomb Perignon
selections.reason: Chris Waller-trained filly who has put together consecutive narrow runner-up finishes at this track and distance. Drawn ideally in barrier 1 and looks the class runner here.

selections.name: Steplika Lion
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who finished a solid third behind Show'em Who's King last start over this course and distance. Handles the soft conditions well.

selections.name: Sealord
selections.reason: Finished fourth in the same key reference race on July 4. Gets the services of Fred Larson and should be competitive from midfield.

selections.name: Five Of Us
selections.reason: Ran a much-improved second over this track and distance on June 27. Drawn well in barrier 2 and can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Steplika Lion
danger_horse.reason: Main danger coming off a strong third-place finish at this track and distance on July 4.

selections.name: Metal Man
selections.reason: Kelly Schweida-trained gelding who was a close third at this track two starts back. Wiggins rides and he looks well-placed in this Class 1.

selections.name: I Am Gone
selections.reason: Impressive last-start winner at Kilcoy over 4f on a wet track. Drawn beautifully in barrier 2 and has high tactical speed.

selections.name: Ciphertext
selections.reason: Extremely consistent performer at Gold Coast with multiple minor placings recently. Handles soft ground and must be respected.

selections.name: Autumngirl
selections.reason: Finished a solid fifth last start at this track. Fitter now and has the class to be in the finish.

danger_horse.name: I Am Gone
danger_horse.reason: Last-start winner who has the early speed to cross and lead from the inside draw.

selections.name: Argentum Rock
selections.reason: Excellent runner-up last start over this course and distance. Won the start prior and loves the Gold Coast track. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1.

selections.name: Vandevelde
selections.reason: Class dropper who comes out of the G3 Winx Guineas and G3 Gunsynd. This is a massive drop in grade and he should prove hard to beat.

selections.name: Bon Riviere
selections.reason: Won his maiden over this course and distance last start in soft going. Up in grade but has upside.

selections.name: Pink Vixen
selections.reason: Consistent benchmark performer who was a close third at this track two starts back. Right in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Vandevelde
danger_horse.reason: Massive class dropper who has been competing against elite metropolitan three-year-olds.

selections.name: Lipizzaner
selections.reason: Highly promising Snitzel gelding resuming from a break. Trial form has been excellent and he has the class to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: The Grand Duchy
selections.reason: Ran a strong third last start at this track. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 and should get a lovely run on the speed.

selections.name: Reign Of Dame
selections.reason: Consistent filly with consecutive third-place finishes at Toowoomba. Handles soft ground and is drawn well.

selections.name: Fawunderpar
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut when fourth at Sunshine Coast. Fitter now and Wiggins takes the ride.

danger_horse.name: The Grand Duchy
danger_horse.reason: Main threat who has the tactical speed to utilize the inside barrier.

selections.name: Keiko Say
selections.reason: Very consistent mare at this track. Gets the services of apprentice McKenzie Apel with a 2kg claim, making her highly competitive.

selections.name: Davikar
selections.reason: Solid performer who is drawn perfectly in barrier 2. Handles the soft track well and should get a great run.

selections.name: Hermione Prancer
selections.reason: Waller-trained filly who drops in class from metropolitan level. Expected to do much better here.

selections.name: Chicago King
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who is always around the mark. Handles the track and distance well.

danger_horse.name: Davikar
danger_horse.reason: Main danger who is drawn to get the run of the race behind the speed.

selections.name: Carnegie Hill
selections.reason: In superb form, winning last start at Beaudesert and finishing a close second at this track prior. Looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Notes (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent third last start at this track. Drawn barrier 1 and Wiggins takes the ride, making him a major threat.

selections.name: Watermelon
selections.reason: Very consistent performer at Gold Coast. Handles the soft track and is drawn to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Hideout
selections.reason: Ran a strong third last start at this track. Has the class to figure despite the wide barrier.

danger_horse.name: Notes (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Main danger coming off a very close third-place finish and gets a soft run from barrier 1.

selections.name: Count Nicholas
selections.reason: Extremely consistent benchmark performer who has been runner-up in his last two starts at this track. Drawn barrier 1 and gets a claim.

selections.name: I Stole It
selections.reason: Strong last-start winner at Ipswich. In great form and handles the soft conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Surfers Royale
selections.reason: Classy sprinter returning from a spell. Has won previously when fresh and trial form has been excellent.

selections.name: Boondocks
selections.reason: Resumes here. Has a good fresh record and is capable of a bold showing from a soft draw.

danger_horse.name: I Stole It
danger_horse.reason: Last-start winner who is in peak fitness and handles wet tracks with ease.

selections.name: Spirit Of Brodie
selections.reason: Outstanding last-start winner at this track and distance. Drawn barrier 1 and is in peak form, making him the one to beat.

selections.name: Muschialli
selections.reason: Won last start at this track. Very consistent open-class sprinter who handles soft ground well.

selections.name: Holy Racket (NZ)
selections.reason: Classy sprinter returning from a spell. Trial form has been excellent and he has a great fresh record.

selections.name: Chakra Boy
selections.reason: Resumes here. Has high speed and can run a very cheeky race fresh from barrier 5.

danger_horse.name: Muschialli
danger_horse.reason: Main danger who is a proven open-class performer at this track and distance.
